spells.name: Acid Splash
spells.desc: You hurl a bubble of acid. One creature you can see within range must succeed on a DEX save or take 2d6 acid damage. Damage increases to 3d6 at level 5, 4d6 at level 11, 5d6 at level 17.

spells.name: Blade Ward
spells.desc: Until the spell ends, when you are hit by a weapon attack, the attacker takes 1d6 Force damage, and you gain Resistance to that attack's damage. Scales with level.

spells.name: Booming Blade
spells.components: S, M (a melee weapon worth at least 1 SP)
spells.desc: You brandish the weapon used in the spell's casting and make a melee attack with it. On a hit, the target suffers the attack's normal effects plus 1d8 Thunder damage if it moves before the start of your next turn. This thunder damage increases to 2d8 at level 5, 3d8 at level 11, and 4d8 at level 17.

spells.name: Chill Touch
spells.desc: You touch a creature, which must succeed on a CON save or take 1d10 Necrotic damage and lose the ability to regain HP until the start of your next turn. Undead have disadvantage on this save. Damage increases: 2d10 at 5th, 3d10 at 11th, 4d10 at 17th.

spells.name: Dancing Lights
spells.components: V, S, M (a bit of phosphorus)
spells.desc: You create up to four torch-sized lights within range. You can combine them into one Medium glowing form or keep them separate. As a Bonus Action, you can move the lights up to 60 feet.

spells.name: Druidcraft
spells.desc: Create a tiny, harmless sensory effect that predicts weather; make a flower bloom or seed sprout; create an instantaneous sensory effect (rustling leaves, wind, crackling fire); light or snuff out a candle, torch, or small campfire.

spells.name: Eldritch Blast
spells.desc: A beam of crackling energy strikes one creature. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 Force damage. The spell creates more than one beam when you reach higher levels: two beams at 5th, three at 11th, and four at 17th.

spells.name: Fire Bolt
spells.desc: You hurl a mote of fire at a creature or object. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 Fire damage. Damage increases: 2d10 at 5th, 3d10 at 11th, 4d10 at 17th.

spells.name: Guidance
spells.desc: You touch a willing creature. Once before the spell ends, the target can roll 1d4 and add the number rolled to one ability check, saving throw, or attack roll. Then the spell ends.

spells.name: Light
spells.components: V, M (a firefly or phosphorescent moss)
spells.desc: You touch one Large or smaller object. It sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet. The effect lasts for 1 hour or until you dismiss it. If the object is held or carried by a hostile creature, that creature must succeed on a DEX save.

spells.name: Mage Hand
spells.desc: A spectral hand appears at a point you choose within range. The hand lasts for 1 minute or until you dismiss it. The hand can manipulate objects, open unlocked doors and containers, stow or retrieve items from open containers, and pour contents from vials.

spells.name: Mending
spells.desc: This spell repairs a single break or tear in an object. As long as the break or tear is no larger than 1 foot in any dimension, you mend it, leaving no trace of the former damage. This spell can physically repair a magic item or construct.

spells.name: Message
spells.components: S, M (a piece of copper wire)
spells.desc: You point your finger toward a creature within range and whisper a message. The target (and only the target) hears the message and can reply in a whisper that only you can hear.

spells.name: Minor Illusion
spells.desc: You create a sound or an image of an object within range that lasts for the duration. A creature that succeeds on an INT (Investigation) check against your spell save DC discerns it as an illusion.

spells.name: Poison Spray
spells.desc: You spray toxic mist at one creature within range. The target must succeed on a CON save or take 2d12 Poison damage. Damage increases: 3d12 at 5th, 4d12 at 11th, 5d12 at 17th.

spells.name: Prestidigitation
spells.desc: This spell is a minor magical trick. You can create one of the following effects: a small sensory effect, light or snuff a fire, clean or soil an object, chill/warm/flavor non-living material, color or mark an object, create a trinket. Up to three effects can be active at a time.

spells.name: Ray of Frost
spells.desc: A ray of freezing air and ice streaks toward a creature. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, it takes 1d8 Cold damage and its Speed decreases by 10 ft until the start of your next turn. Damage: 2d8 at 5th, 3d8 at 11th, 4d8 at 17th.

spells.name: Sacred Flame
spells.desc: Flame-like radiance descends on a creature you can see. The creature must succeed on a DEX save or take 1d8 Radiant damage. Damage increases: 2d8 at 5th, 3d8 at 11th, 4d8 at 17th.

spells.name: Shillelagh
spells.components: V, S, M (mistletoe and a shamrock leaf)
spells.desc: The wood of a club or a quarterstaff you are holding is imbued with nature's power. For the duration, you can use your WIS modifier for attacks and damage rolls with that weapon, and its damage die becomes a d8. The weapon also becomes magical.

spells.name: Shocking Grasp
spells.desc: Lightning springs from your hand. Make a melee spell attack against a creature. You have advantage if it's wearing metal armor. On a hit, it takes 1d8 Lightning damage and can't take reactions until the start of its next turn. Damage: 2d8 at 5th, 3d8 at 11th, 4d8 at 17th.

spells.name: Spare the Dying
spells.desc: Choose a creature within range that has 0 HP and is not dead. The creature becomes Stable. In 5.2, this cantrip has a range of 15 feet instead of Touch.

spells.name: Starry Wisp
spells.desc: You launch a mote of light at one creature or object within range. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 Radiant damage, and until the end of your next turn, it emits Dim Light in a 10-foot radius and can't benefit from being Invisible. Damage: 2d8 at 5th, 3d8 at 11th, 4d8 at 17th.

spells.name: Thaumaturgy
spells.desc: You manifest a minor wonder: amplify your voice, cause flames to flicker, cause tremors, create an instantaneous sound, open or slam doors, or alter the appearance of your eyes. Up to three effects can be active at a time.

spells.name: Toll the Dead
spells.desc: A mournful bell tolls around one creature you can see. It must succeed on a WIS save or take 1d8 Necrotic damage (1d12 if it's missing any HP). Damage increases at 5th (2d8/2d12), 11th (3d8/3d12), 17th (4d8/4d12).

spells.name: True Strike
spells.components: S, M (a weapon with which you have proficiency)
spells.desc: Guided by a flash of magical insight, you make one attack with the weapon used in the spell's casting. The attack uses your spellcasting ability for the attack and damage rolls instead of STR or DEX. On a hit, the weapon deals 1d6 additional damage of its type. Damage: 2d6 at 5th, 3d6 at 11th, 4d6 at 17th.

spells.name: Vicious Mockery
spells.desc: You unleash a string of insults laced with magic. The creature must succeed on a WIS save or take 1d6 Psychic damage and have Disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn. Damage: 2d6 at 5th, 3d6 at 11th, 4d6 at 17th.

spells.name: Alarm
spells.components: V, S, M (a tiny bell and a piece of fine silver wire)
spells.desc: You set an alarm against unwanted intrusion. Choose a door, a window, or an area within range no larger than a 20-foot cube. Until the spell ends, an alarm alerts you whenever a Tiny or larger creature touches or enters the warded area.

spells.name: Bane
spells.components: V, S, M (a drop of blood)
spells.desc: Up to three creatures you can see within range must succeed on a CHA save or, whenever they make an attack roll or saving throw, they must roll a 1d4 and subtract the result.

spells.name: Bless
spells.components: V, S, M (a sprinkling of holy water)
spells.desc: Up to three willing creatures gain a 1d4 bonus to attack rolls and saving throws for the duration. At higher levels, one additional creature per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Burning Hands
spells.desc: Thin sheets of flames shoot from your outstretched hands. Each creature in a 15-foot cone must make a DEX save. On a fail, 3d6 Fire damage; half on success. Flammable objects ignite. +1d6 per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Charm Person
spells.desc: One humanoid you can see must succeed on a WIS save or be Charmed by you. While charmed, it regards you as a friendly acquaintance. At higher levels: +1 target per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Command
spells.desc: You speak a one-word command to a creature you can see. It must succeed on a WIS save or follow the command on its next turn. At higher levels: +1 target per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Comprehend Languages
spells.desc: For the duration, you understand the literal meaning of any spoken language you hear. You also understand any written language you see, but you must be touching the surface on which the words are written.

spells.name: Cure Wounds
spells.desc: A creature you touch regains 2d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier HP. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs. At higher levels: +2d8 per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Detect Magic
spells.desc: For the duration, you sense the presence of magic within 30 feet. If you sense magic, you can use your action to see a faint aura around visible magical creatures and objects, and learn their school of magic.

spells.name: Divine Favor
spells.desc: Your prayer empowers you with divine radiance. Until the spell ends, your weapon attacks deal an extra 1d4 Radiant damage on a hit.

spells.name: Expeditious Retreat
spells.desc: This spell allows you to move at an incredible pace. For the duration, your Speed increases by 10 feet, and taking the Dash action is a Bonus Action for you.

spells.name: Faerie Fire
spells.desc: Each object in a 20-foot cube within range is outlined in blue, green, or violet light. Any attack roll against an affected creature or object has advantage, and it can't benefit from being invisible.

spells.name: Feather Fall
spells.components: V, M (a small feather or piece of down)
spells.desc: Choose up to five falling creatures within range. Their rate of descent slows to 60 feet per round until the spell ends. They take no falling damage and can land on their feet.

spells.name: Find Familiar
spells.components: V, S, M (10 GP worth of charcoal, incense, and herbs)
spells.desc: You gain the service of a familiar, a spirit in the form of an animal you choose. The familiar acts independently, but it always obeys your commands. You can communicate telepathically and share senses with it.

spells.name: Fog Cloud
spells.desc: You create a 20-foot-radius sphere of fog centered on a point within range. The sphere spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. It lasts for the duration or until a wind of moderate or greater speed disperses it. At higher levels, radius increases by 20 ft per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Goodberry
spells.components: V, S, M (a sprig of mistletoe)
spells.desc: Up to ten berries appear in your hand, infused with magic for 24 hours. A creature can use its action to eat one, regaining 1 HP, and is nourished for a day. The berries lose potency if not consumed within 24 hours.

spells.name: Grease
spells.components: V, S, M (a bit of pork rind or butter)
spells.desc: Slick grease covers the ground in a 10-foot square centered on a point within range. The area becomes Difficult Terrain for the duration. Each creature in the area when the spell is cast must succeed on a DEX save or fall Prone.

spells.name: Guiding Bolt
spells.desc: A flash of light streaks toward a creature. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 4d6 Radiant damage, and the next attack against it before the end of your next turn has advantage. +1d6 per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Healing Word
spells.desc: A creature of your choice within range regains 2d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier HP. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs. At higher levels: +2d4 per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Hellish Rebuke
spells.desc: When you are damaged by a creature within range, you can use your reaction to unleash a burst of flames. The creature must make a DEX save or take 2d10 Fire damage, or half on success. At higher levels: +1d10 per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Heroism
spells.desc: A willing creature you touch is imbued with bravery. Until the spell ends, the creature is immune to the Frightened condition and gains Temporary HP equal to your spellcasting ability modifier at the start of each of its turns. At higher levels: +1 target per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Hunter's Mark
spells.desc: You choose a creature you can see and mystically mark it as your quarry. Until the spell ends, you deal an extra 1d6 damage to the target whenever you hit it with an attack roll, and you have advantage on Perception and Survival checks to find it. If it dies, you can move the mark (no action). At higher levels: 8 hours (3rd), 24 hours (5th).

spells.name: Identify
spells.components: V, S, M (a pearl worth 100 GP and an owl feather)
spells.desc: You choose one object that you must touch throughout the casting. If it is a magic item or some other magic-imbued object, you learn its properties, how to use them, and any charges it has. You also learn whether any spells are affecting the item and what they are.

spells.name: Inflict Wounds
spells.desc: Make a melee spell attack against a creature. On a hit, the target takes 2d10 Necrotic damage. At higher levels: +2d10 per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Jump
spells.components: V, S, M (a grasshopper's hind leg)
spells.desc: You touch a willing creature. Once on each of its turns until the spell ends, the target can jump up to 30 feet by spending 10 feet of movement.

spells.name: Longstrider
spells.components: V, S, M (a pinch of dirt)
spells.desc: You touch a creature. Its speed increases by 10 feet until the spell ends. At higher levels: +1 target per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Mage Armor
spells.components: V, S, M (a piece of cured leather)
spells.desc: You touch a willing creature who isn't wearing armor. Its AC equals 13 + its DEX modifier. The spell ends if the target dons armor or dismisses the spell.

spells.name: Magic Missile
spells.desc: You create three glowing darts of magical force. Each dart automatically hits a target of your choice within range for 1d4 + 1 Force damage. The darts strike simultaneously. At higher levels: +1 dart per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Protection from Evil and Good
spells.components: V, S, M (holy water or powdered silver and iron)
spells.desc: Until the spell ends, one willing creature you touch is protected against aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead. The protection grants advantage on saving throws against them, they can't possess or charm the target, and they have disadvantage on attack rolls against the target.

spells.name: Ray of Sickness
spells.desc: A ray of sickening greenish energy lashes out. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 2d8 Poison damage and must make a CON save or be Poisoned until the end of your next turn. +1d8 per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Shield
spells.desc: An invisible barrier of magical force appears and protects you until the start of your next turn. You gain +5 to AC, including against the triggering attack, and you take no damage from Magic Missile.

spells.name: Shield of Faith
spells.components: V, S, M (a small parchment with a holy text)
spells.desc: A shimmering field appears around a creature within range, granting it +2 bonus to AC for the duration.

spells.name: Silent Image
spells.components: V, S, M (a bit of fleece)
spells.desc: You create the image of an object, a creature, or some other visible phenomenon in a 15-foot cube within range. The image appears lifelike but has no physical presence. A creature that succeeds on an INT (Investigation) check against your spell save DC discerns it as an illusion.

spells.name: Sleep
spells.components: V, S, M (a pinch of sand, a rose petal, or a cricket)
spells.desc: You send creatures into a magical slumber. Roll 5d8. One creature of your choice within range whose current HP is less than or equal to the roll falls Unconscious until the spell ends, the sleeper takes damage, or someone uses an action to wake the sleeper. At higher levels: +2d8 per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Thunderwave
spells.desc: A wave of thunderous force sweeps out from you. Each creature in a 15-foot cube must make a CON save. On a fail, it takes 2d8 Thunder damage and is pushed 10 feet away. On a success, half damage, no push. Unsecured objects are automatically pushed. At higher levels: +1d8 per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Witch Bolt
spells.components: V, S, M (a twig from a tree that has been struck by lightning)
spells.desc: A beam of crackling, blue energy lances at a creature, forming a sustained arc of lightning between you and the target. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 2d12 Lightning damage. On each of your turns, you can use a Bonus Action to deal 1d12 Lightning damage to the target automatically. At higher levels: +1d12 initial damage per slot above 1st.

spells.name: Wrathful Smite
spells.desc: The next time you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack before this spell ends, your attack deals an extra 1d6 Psychic damage. Additionally, if the target is a creature, it must succeed on a WIS save or be Frightened of you until the spell ends.

spells.name: Aid
spells.components: V, S, M (a strip of white cloth)
spells.desc: Your spell bolsters up to three creatures within range. Each target's HP maximum and current HP increase by 5 for the duration. At higher levels: +5 HP per slot above 2nd.

spells.name: Blindness/Deafness
spells.desc: You can blind or deafen a foe. Choose one creature, which must make a CON save or be Blinded or Deafened. It can save again at the end of each of its turns. At higher levels: +1 target per slot above 2nd.

spells.name: Blur
spells.desc: Your body becomes blurred, shifting and wavering. For the duration, any creature that targets you with an attack has disadvantage on the attack roll. An attacker immune to the blinded condition is unaffected.

spells.name: Calm Emotions
spells.desc: You attempt to suppress strong emotions in a group. Each humanoid in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on a point you choose must make a CHA save. On a fail, choose one effect: suppress the Charmed or Frightened condition, or make them indifferent about creatures of your choice that they are hostile toward.

spells.name: Cloud of Daggers
spells.components: V, S, M (a sliver of glass)
spells.desc: You fill the air in a 5-foot cube with spinning daggers. A creature takes 4d4 Slashing damage when it enters the spell's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there. At higher levels: +2d4 per slot above 2nd.

spells.name: Crown of Madness
spells.desc: One humanoid you can see must succeed on a WIS save or become Charmed for the duration. The charmed target must use its action before moving to make a melee attack against one creature other than itself that you mentally choose.

spells.name: Darkness
spells.components: V, M (bat fur and a drop of pitch or a piece of coal)
spells.desc: Magical darkness spreads from a point you choose within range to fill a 15-foot-radius sphere for the duration. The darkness spreads around corners. Darkvision can't penetrate this darkness, and no nonmagical light can illuminate it.

spells.name: Darkvision
spells.components: V, S, M (a pinch of dried carrot or an agate)
spells.desc: You touch a willing creature. For the duration, that creature has Darkvision out to a range of 60 feet.

spells.name: Enhance Ability
spells.components: V, S, M (fur or feather from a beast)
spells.desc: You touch a creature and bestow upon it a magical enhancement. Choose one effect: Bull's Strength (+1d4 STR checks, carry weight doubled), Cat's Grace (+1d4 DEX checks, no fall damage under 20 ft), Bear's Endurance (+1d4 CON checks, 2d6 temp HP), Fox's Cunning (+1d4 INT checks), Owl's Wisdom (+1d4 WIS checks), or Eagle's Splendor (+1d4 CHA checks). At higher levels: +1 target per slot above 2nd.

spells.name: Find Traps
spells.desc: You sense the presence of any trap within range that is within line of sight. A trap, for the purpose of this spell, includes anything that would inflict a sudden or unexpected effect if a creature interacts with it. You learn the general nature of the danger presented by a trap you sense.

spells.name: Flame Blade
spells.desc: You evoke a fiery blade in your free hand. The blade is a simple melee weapon that you are proficient with. On a hit, it deals 3d6 Fire damage and emits bright light in a 10-foot radius. You can dismiss it as a Bonus Action. At higher levels: +1d6 per two slot levels above 2nd.

spells.name: Flaming Sphere
spells.components: V, S, M (tallow, brimstone, and powdered iron)
spells.desc: A 5-foot-diameter sphere of fire appears in an unoccupied space. Any creature that ends its turn within 5 feet must make a DEX save or take 2d6 Fire damage (half on success). As a Bonus Action, you can move the sphere up to 30 feet. At higher levels: +1d6 per slot above 2nd.

spells.name: Heat Metal
spells.components: V, S, M (a piece of iron and a flame)
spells.desc: Choose a manufactured metal object. The object glows red-hot, and any creature in physical contact with it takes 2d8 Fire damage at the start of its turn and must succeed on a CON save or drop the object. At higher levels: +1d8 per slot above 2nd.

spells.name: Hold Person
spells.components: V, S, M (a small, straight piece of iron)
spells.desc: Choose a humanoid that you can see within range. The target must succeed on a WIS save or be Paralyzed for the duration. At the end of each of its turns, the target can make another WIS save. At higher levels: +1 target per slot above 2nd.

spells.name: Invisibility
spells.components: V, S, M (an eyelash encased in gum arabic)
spells.desc: A creature you touch becomes Invisible until the spell ends. Anything the target is wearing or carrying is also invisible. The spell ends if the target attacks or casts a spell. At higher levels: +1 target per slot above 2nd.

spells.name: Knock
spells.desc: Choose an object within range that is locked. A lock opens, a set of manacles unlocks, or a door barred from the other side becomes unbarred. Knock sets a loud knock audible from 300 feet.

spells.name: Lesser Restoration
spells.desc: You touch a creature and can end one disease or one condition afflicting it: Blinded, Deafened, Paralyzed, or Poisoned.

spells.name: Levitate
spells.components: V, S, M (either a small leather loop or a piece of golden wire bent into a cup)
spells.desc: One creature or object weighing up to 500 pounds rises vertically, up to 20 feet, and remains suspended for the duration. A creature can make a CON save to resist. The target can move only by pushing against a solid object or by being pushed.

spells.name: Magic Weapon
spells.desc: You touch a nonmagical weapon. Until the spell ends, that weapon becomes a magic weapon with a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls. At higher levels: +2 (4th) or +3 (6th).

spells.name: Mirror Image
spells.desc: Three illusory duplicates of yourself appear. When a creature targets you with an attack, roll a d6 to see if the attack hits a duplicate: 1-2 you're hit, 3-4 first duplicate, 5-6 second duplicate (if three exist). A hit destroys a duplicate.

spells.name: Misty Step
spells.desc: Briefly surrounded by silvery mist, you teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.

spells.name: Pass without Trace
spells.components: V, S, M (ashes from a burned leaf of mistletoe and a sprig of spruce)
spells.desc: A veil of shadows and silence radiates from you, masking you and your companions from detection. For the duration, each creature you choose within 30 feet of you has a +10 bonus to Stealth checks and can't be tracked except by magical means.

spells.name: Prayer of Healing
spells.desc: Up to five creatures of your choice within range each regain 2d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier HP. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs. At higher levels: +1d8 per slot above 2nd.

spells.name: Shatter
spells.components: V, S, M (a chip of mica)
spells.desc: A sudden loud ringing noise emanates from a point of your choice. Every creature within 10 feet must make a CON save or take 3d8 Thunder damage (half on success). Non-magical objects in the area automatically take this damage. At higher levels: +1d8 per slot above 2nd.

spells.name: Silence
spells.desc: For the duration, no sound can be created within or pass through a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on a point you choose within range. Any creature or object entirely inside the sphere is immune to thunder damage and is Deafened. Casting a spell that includes a verbal component is impossible there.

spells.name: Spider Climb
spells.components: V, S, M (a drop of bitumen and a spider)
spells.desc: Until the spell ends, one willing creature you touch gains the ability to move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and upside down along ceilings, while leaving its hands free. The target also gains a climbing speed equal to its walking speed.

spells.name: Spiritual Weapon
spells.desc: You create a floating, spectral weapon within range that lasts for the duration. When you cast the spell, you can make a melee spell attack against a creature within 5 feet of the weapon (1d8 + spellcasting modifier Force damage). As a Bonus Action each turn, you can move the weapon up to 20 feet and repeat the attack. At higher levels: +1d8 per two slot levels above 2nd.

spells.name: Suggestion
spells.components: V, M (a snake's tongue and either a bit of honeycomb or a drop of sweet oil)
spells.desc: You suggest a course of activity (no more than a few sentences) to a creature that can hear and understand you. The creature must succeed on a WIS save or pursue the course of action you described. The suggestion must be worded to sound reasonable.

spells.name: Warding Bond
spells.components: V, S, M (a pair of platinum rings worth 50 GP each, worn by both target and caster)
spells.desc: This spell wards a willing creature you touch and creates a mystic connection. While the target is within 60 feet of you, it gains +1 AC and saving throws, and resistance to all damage. Each time it takes damage, you take the same amount. The spell ends if either of you drops to 0 HP or if you and the target are separated by more than 60 feet.

spells.name: Web
spells.components: V, S, M (a bit of spiderweb)
spells.desc: You conjure a mass of thick, sticky webbing at a point of your choice within range, filling a 20-foot cube. Creatures in the webs must succeed on a DEX save or be Restrained. A creature can break free by using its action to make a STR check against your spell save DC.

spells.name: Bestow Curse
spells.desc: You touch a creature and it must succeed on a WIS save or be cursed. Choose one of: Disadvantage on ability checks using a chosen ability score; Disadvantage on attacks against you; WIS save or waste action doing nothing; +1d8 Necrotic damage from your attacks. At higher levels: concentration extends (up to 10 min at 4th, 8 hours at 5th+, 24 hours at 7th+, until dispelled at 9th).

spells.name: Call Lightning
spells.desc: A storm cloud appears at a point 100 feet directly above you. Each turn you can use a Bonus Action to call a bolt of lightning from the cloud to a point below it, dealing 3d10 Lightning damage (DEX save halves). In stormy conditions, damage increases to 4d10. At higher levels: +1d10 per slot above 3rd.

spells.name: Counterspell
spells.desc: You attempt to interrupt a creature in the process of casting a spell. If the creature is casting a spell of 3rd level or lower, its spell fails. For higher level spells, make a spellcasting ability check (DC 10 + spell's level). At higher levels: automatically counters spells of equal or lower level.

spells.name: Dispel Magic
spells.desc: Choose one creature, object, or magical effect within range. Any spell of 3rd level or lower on the target ends. For each spell of 4th level or higher, make a spellcasting ability check (DC 10 + spell's level). At higher levels: automatically ends spells of equal or lower level.

spells.name: Fear
spells.components: V, S, M (a white feather or the heart of a hen)
spells.desc: You project a phantasmal image in a 30-foot cone. Each creature must make a WIS save or be Frightened of you and drop anything it is holding. While frightened, it must use the Dash action to move away from you. It can repeat the save at the end of each turn.

spells.name: Fireball
spells.components: V, S, M (a tiny ball of bat guano and sulfur)
spells.desc: A bright streak flashes and blossoms with a low roar into a 20-foot-radius explosion of flame. Each creature in the area must make a DEX save. Failure: 8d6 Fire damage. Success: half. The fire spreads around corners and ignites flammable objects not being worn or carried. At higher levels: +1d6 per slot above 3rd.

spells.name: Fly
spells.components: V, S, M (a wing feather from any bird)
spells.desc: You touch a willing creature. The target gains a flying speed of 60 feet for the duration. When the spell ends, the target falls if it is still aloft, unless it can stop the fall. At higher levels: +1 target per slot above 3rd.

spells.name: Haste
spells.components: V, S, M (a shaving of licorice root)
spells.desc: Choose a willing creature within range. Until the spell ends, the target's Speed is doubled, it gains +2 AC, has advantage on DEX saving throws, and gains an additional action on each of its turns (only for Attack once, Dash, Disengage, Hide, or Use Object). When the spell ends, the target can't move or take actions until after its next turn.

spells.name: Lightning Bolt
spells.components: V, S, M (a bit of fur and a rod of amber, crystal, or glass)
spells.desc: A stroke of lightning forms a 5-foot-wide, 100-foot-long line of energy. Each creature in the line must make a DEX save. Failure: 8d6 Lightning damage. Success: half. The lightning ignites flammable objects and can ricochet off surfaces. At higher levels: +1d6 per slot above 3rd.

spells.name: Mass Healing Word
spells.desc: As you call out words of restoration, up to six creatures of your choice within range regain HP equal to 2d4 + your spellcasting ability modifier. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs. At higher levels: +1d4 per slot above 3rd.

spells.name: Plant Growth
spells.desc: This spell channels vitality into plants. If cast as an action, plants in a 100-foot radius are overgrown and become Difficult Terrain for 1 hour. If cast over 8 hours, farmland yields twice its normal crop for 1 year.

spells.name: Protection from Energy
spells.desc: For the duration, the willing creature you touch has resistance to one damage type of your choice: acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder.

spells.name: Sending
spells.components: V, S, M (a short piece of fine copper wire)
spells.desc: You send a short message of 25 words or fewer to a creature you are familiar with. The creature hears the message in its mind and can reply in a brief message of 25 words or fewer. Sending succeeds even across other planes of existence, though the spell is blocked by Lead.

spells.name: Slow
spells.components: V, S, M (a drop of molasses)
spells.desc: You alter time around up to six creatures of your choice in a 40-foot cube. Each target must succeed on a WIS save. Failure: Speed halved, -2 AC and DEX saves, can't use reactions, can take only an action OR bonus action each turn, and can't cast a spell that takes 1 action (but can use a bonus action spell). It can repeat the save at the end of each turn.

spells.name: Speak with Dead
spells.desc: You grant the semblance of life and intelligence to a corpse of your choice that has a mouth, allowing it to answer the questions you pose. The corpse knows only what it knew in life, and it can't answer questions about events after its death.

spells.name: Spirit Guardians
spells.desc: Spectral creatures flit around you in a 15-foot radius. Choose good/neutral (radiant/slashing) or evil (necrotic/slashing). Enemies that enter or start their turn there make a WIS save. Failure: 3d8 damage. Success: half. Your speed is halved while active. At higher levels: +1d8 per slot above 3rd.

spells.name: Vampiric Touch
spells.desc: The touch of your shadow-wreathed hand can siphon life force from others. Make a melee spell attack against a creature. On a hit, deal 3d6 Necrotic damage and regain HP equal to half the damage dealt. Until the spell ends, you can make the attack again each turn as an action. At higher levels: +1d6 per slot above 3rd.
